fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> instance configured according to the specified arguments.

params.args: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments" /> specifying the variation position, collection index, palette index, and palette overrides for the clone.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface by cloning the current typeface with the specified font arguments.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> instance using the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette to use.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface by cloning the current typeface with the specified color palette index.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> instance at the specified variation design position.

params.position: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying the desired axis coordinates.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface by cloning the current typeface at the specified variation design position.

fields.value: A shared empty <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> instance with no glyphs.
fields.summary: Gets a shared empty typeface that contains no glyphs.

fields.returns: The number of variation axis parameter descriptors written into <paramref name="axes" />.

params.axes: A span that receives the variation axis parameter descriptors.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the variation axis parameters for this typeface.

fields.returns: The number of variation coordinates written into <paramref name="coordinates" />.

params.coordinates: A span that receives the current variation design position coordinates.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the current variation design position of this typeface.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the typeface contains no glyphs; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the typeface is empty (contains no glyphs).

fields.value: The total number of variation axes defined for this typeface.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axis parameters defined for this typeface.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values describing the available variation axes, or an empty array if no variation data is present.
fields.summary: Gets information about all variation axes defined for this typeface.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values representing the current variation design position, or an empty array if no variation data is present.
fields.summary: Gets the current variation design position of this typeface.

fields.value: The total number of variation coordinates in the current design position.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation design position coordinates for this typeface.
